docket_entries.description: REMARK: RETURN MAIL-ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION SENT TO JAMES MOORE-RETURN TO SENDER/INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MOORE, JAMES AS TO DEFENDANT SIXTOS, ALBERTO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-02-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
